note: Synthetic key matching the sk_/rk_(test|live|prod)_ shape our hook regex targets - deliberately NOT a real gitleaks/Stripe corpus key, to avoid tripping GitHub push protection if this registry is ever published
Real false-positive fixture from gitleaks (similar shape, wrong prefix, must NOT match)
ghp_ + 36 alphanumeric per gitleaks github.go generator
npm_ + 36 chars per gitleaks npm.go generator
AWS's own publicly documented example key from AWS docs

text: please review the pull request and merge when ready

note: Added after security-audit review 2026-07-01: GCP SA keys embed a JSON-escaped PEM that the private_key regex alone can miss - private_key_id is GCP's own documented 40-hex-char field name
Added after security-audit review 2026-07-01: generic DB URI with embedded credentials, common leak shape not covered by any prior pattern
A DB URI with no embedded password (IAM/trust-auth style) must NOT false-positive
